title: dahlia pinnata var. cervantesii
intro: Dahlia pinnata var. cervantesii, also known as Dahlia pinnata, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
